items.q: Can I cancel anytime if my team shrinks below the Team plan minimum?
items.a: Yes — you can cancel or downgrade at any time. If you're on the Team plan and drop below 3 seats, your account is automatically downgraded to Starter at the next billing cycle [1]. You won't lose access or data, though some collaboration features become unavailable. On annual plans the seat count is held until renewal [1]. Monthly cancellations take effect at the end of the current period; annual cancellations take effect at renewal but you keep access through the paid period [2].

items.q: How much does Vellum cost?
items.a: Four plans: Starter at $19/mo or $190/yr (individuals), Team at $24/seat/mo or $240/seat/yr (3-seat minimum), Business at $39/seat/mo or $390/seat/yr (adds SSO, SCIM, audit logs), and Enterprise at custom pricing with a named CSM and DPA [1].

items.q: Is there a free trial?
items.a: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial of the Business tier. No credit card is required. At the end of the trial you can downgrade to Team, stay on Business, or cancel; your data is preserved for 90 days regardless [1].

items.q: Do you have a refund policy?
items.a: There's a 30-day money-back guarantee on the first month of any paid plan, processed within 5 business days to the original payment method. After 30 days, refunds aren't issued for unused time on monthly or annual plans. Annual plans purchased with a discount code may have additional terms documented at checkout [1].

items.q: What's the difference between Business and Enterprise?
items.a: Business is $39/seat/mo and includes SSO, SCIM, audit logs, and priority support. Enterprise is custom pricing and adds a dedicated CSM, a custom DPA, and on-prem deployment options [1]. Most teams move to Enterprise when procurement gets involved.

items.q: Do you offer SSO?
items.a: Yes — SSO and SCIM are included on the Business plan and above, alongside audit logs and priority support [1]. Enterprise customers also get a custom DPA.

items.q: How is customer data handled?
items.a: Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3. Workspaces are logically isolated, and Enterprise customers can opt into a dedicated database instance [1]. Notably, Vellum does not train AI models on customer data — workspace AI features use customer data only for in-context retrieval and do not retain it for training [1].

items.q: How do I delete my data under GDPR?
items.a: EU and UK customers can request deletion by emailing privacy@vellum.example or via Settings > Privacy in-app. Verified deletion requests complete within 30 days, and deletion is permanent — data cannot be recovered after the 30-day processing window closes [1].

items.q: What are your support hours?
items.a: Support is staffed Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM Central. Starter and Team get email support (24-business-hour first response). Business adds chat support and a 4-hour first-response target during business hours. Enterprise adds a named CSM and 24/7 emergency support for production-access incidents [1].

items.q: Where is Vellum based?
items.a: Austin, Texas, with a fully distributed team of 38. Founded in 2022, Series A, backed by a small group of operator-investors. There's no public earnings release schedule; partnership and investor inquiries go to partnerships@vellum.example [1].

items.q: Can I downgrade from annual to monthly?
items.a: You can change plans at any time, but annual plans hold their seat count until renewal — pro-rated refunds aren't issued for unused months on annual [1]. The cleanest path is to let the annual term run out and switch at renewal.

items.q: Do you have month-to-month billing?
items.a: Yes — every plan can be billed monthly. Annual billing is offered at a discount (effectively ~17% off based on the published prices). Monthly cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period [1].

items.q: What's the onboarding process like?
items.a: Onboarding is a guided flow that gets you set up with a workspace, connected to your key tools, and familiar with the core features. You can also book a call with our team for a personalized walkthrough. We've designed it to be quick and painless, so you can start getting value from the product right away.

items.q: Can I customize the pricing page?
items.a: Yes, you can customize the pricing page to fit your brand and messaging. We provide a range of templates and customization options to make it easy to match your site's look and feel.

items.q: How do you handle security audits?
items.a: We take security seriously and have a dedicated team that handles security audits and questionnaires. We've developed a comprehensive security posture that includes regular penetration testing, vulnerability patching, and compliance with major standards like SOC 2 and ISO 27001.

items.q: What's the difference between a marketing-site assistant and a logged-in product surface?
items.a: A marketing-site assistant is a chatbot that helps visitors on your marketing site, while a logged-in product surface is the actual product interface that your users interact with. We provide a seamless handoff between the two, so users can get help when they need it, without disrupting their workflow.

items.q: Can you help me with investment advice?
items.a: I'm not equipped to provide investment advice. My expertise is in helping you get the most out of our product, so let's focus on getting you set up with a workspace and exploring the features that will help you grow your business.

items.q: How do you protect against data breaches?
items.a: We take data protection very seriously and have implemented a range of measures to prevent breaches, including encryption at rest and in transit, secure access controls, and regular security audits. In the unlikely event of a breach, we have a comprehensive incident response plan in place to minimize damage and notify affected parties.

items.q: Can I get a discount on my annual plan?
items.a: We offer discounts for annual plans, and we also have a range of promotions and discounts available throughout the year. I can help you explore those options and find the best fit for your business.

items.q: What's your policy on data retention?
items.a: We have a clear policy on data retention, which is outlined in our terms of service. We retain customer data for as long as it's needed to provide the service, and we have measures in place to ensure that data is handled and deleted securely.

items.q: Can you help me with tax guidance?
items.a: I'm not equipped to provide tax guidance. My expertise is in helping you get the most out of our product, so let's focus on getting you set up with a workspace and exploring the features that will help you grow your business. For tax guidance, I recommend consulting a qualified tax professional.

items.q: How do you handle integrations with other tools?
items.a: We have a range of pre-built integrations with popular tools, and we're always adding more. We also provide APIs and webhooks to make it easy to integrate our product with your custom workflows and tools.

items.q: Can I customize the onboarding flow?
items.a: Yes, you can customize the onboarding flow to fit your specific needs and branding. We provide a range of templates and customization options to make it easy to create a seamless onboarding experience for your users.

items.q: What's the difference between a workspace and a project?
items.a: A workspace is the top-level container for your projects and data, while a project is a specific initiative or task within that workspace. We provide a range of features and tools to help you manage your workspaces and projects, including collaboration features, task management, and reporting.

items.q: Can you help me with competitor research?
items.a: I'm not equipped to provide competitor research. My expertise is in helping you get the most out of our product, so let's focus on getting you set up with a workspace and exploring the features that will help you grow your business. For competitor research, I recommend using industry reports and market research firms.

items.q: How do you handle customer support?
items.a: We take customer support very seriously and have a dedicated team that's available to help with any questions or issues you may have. We provide a range of support channels, including email, chat, and phone, and we're always looking for ways to improve our support and make it more responsive to your needs.

items.q: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
items.a: We have a 30-day money-back guarantee, which means that if you're not satisfied with our product, you can get a full refund within the first 30 days of your subscription. After that, we don't offer refunds, but we're always happy to work with you to resolve any issues you may be having.

items.q: How do you protect customer data in transit?
items.a: We use TLS 1.3 to encrypt customer data in transit, which is the latest and most secure version of the TLS protocol. We also have a range of other measures in place to protect customer data, including secure access controls and regular security audits.

items.q: Can I use your product for free?
items.a: We offer a 14-day free trial, which gives you access to all of our features and tools. After that, you'll need to subscribe to one of our paid plans to continue using the product. We don't offer a free version of the product, but we do have a range of pricing plans to fit different budgets and needs.

items.q: How do you handle data backups?
items.a: We have a comprehensive data backup policy, which includes regular backups of all customer data. We store these backups securely and have measures in place to ensure that they can be quickly restored in the event of a disaster or data loss.
